summary: VenuLock V4 Corporate Redesign - 100% PASS. Verified all 22 features on Desktop (1440x900) and Mobile (390x844). Key V4 changes confirmed: VENULOCK uppercase bold sans-serif wordmark, ALL headings now DM Sans bold (no longer EB Garamond serif), gold accent #D4AF37 (brighter than V3's #C8A960), new tagline 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.', hero headline 5.5rem/88px bold DM Sans, boosted text contrast.
critical_code_review_comments: V4 typography changes correctly implemented: DM Sans bold replaces EB Garamond serif for all headings
Wordmark 'VENULOCK' now uppercase bold sans-serif with letter-spacing 2.16px - professional look achieved
Gold accent color upgraded to #D4AF37 (rgb(212, 175, 55)) - brighter and more visible than V3's #C8A960
Tagline changed from 'We Talk. You Lock.' to 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' - reflects service value
Hero headline 5.5rem/88px on desktop, 40px on mobile - properly responsive
All CTA buttons (GET STARTED, FIND VENUE, START BOOKING) use V4 gold #D4AF37
Text contrast improved: subtitle at rgba(255,255,255,0.6), trust strip visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 corporate redesign verified. Key changes from V3: 1) Wordmark now 'VENULOCK' uppercase bold DM Sans (was italic EB Garamond serif), 2) ALL headings now DM Sans font-weight:700 (was EB Garamond serif), 3) Gold accent changed from #C8A960 to #D4AF37 (brighter), 4) Tagline changed from 'We Talk. You Lock.' to 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.', 5) Hero headline 5.5rem (88px) bold DM Sans, 6) Text contrast boosted across all sections.
